summary: Successfully tested Daily Sessions employee-based features. Backend: 15/15 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 3 tabs working (My Sessions, All Sessions, Reports). User-based session tracking, admin-only features, and permission validation all working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/daily-sessions - Creates session linked to current user (user_id, user_name)
Backend: POST /api/daily-sessions - Prevents duplicate open sessions for same user (400)
Backend: POST /api/daily-sessions - Different users can have their own sessions simultaneously
Backend: GET /api/daily-sessions - Returns only current user's sessions
Backend: GET /api/daily-sessions?all_users=true - Returns all sessions (admin only)
Backend: GET /api/daily-sessions?all_users=true - Non-admin still sees only own sessions
Backend: GET /api/daily-sessions/summary - Returns overall + per-employee report structure
Backend: GET /api/daily-sessions/summary - Requires admin access (403 for non-admin)
Backend: PUT /api/daily-sessions/:id/close - Non-owner cannot close another user's session (403)
Backend: PUT /api/daily-sessions/:id/close - Admin can close any session
Backend: PUT /api/daily-sessions/:id/close - Owner can close own session
Frontend: Daily Sessions page loads with data-testid
Frontend: 'حصصي' (My Sessions) tab displays current user's sessions only
Frontend: 'الكل' (All Sessions) tab displays all employees' sessions (admin only)
Frontend: 'التقارير' (Reports) tab shows overall summary + per-employee breakdown
Frontend: Open Session dialog with opening_cash input works
Frontend: Close Session dialog with closing_cash input works
Frontend: Session history table shows correct columns (Employee, Date, Sales, Difference, Status)
critical_code_review_comments: Session isolation working - each user sees only their sessions unless admin with all_users=true
Permission validation working - non-owner cannot close another user's session
Summary report correctly groups by user_id and calculates per-employee stats
Backward compatibility maintained - old sessions without user_id shown as 'unknown'
Frontend tabs correctly show/hide based on admin role
seed_data_creation: Test employee user created during tests (TEST_employee_*@test.com) and cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Daily Sessions now supports employee-based tracking. Each user opens their own session (user_id stored). Admin can see all sessions via all_users=true flag. Summary API (/api/daily-sessions/summary) provides overall + per-employee reports. Old sessions without user_id appear as 'unknown' in reports - this is expected behavior.

POST /api/daily-sessions.details: Creates session with user_id and user_name linked to current user

GET /api/daily-sessions.details: Returns current user's sessions only (filtered by user_id)

GET /api/daily-sessions?all_users=true.details: Admin sees all sessions, non-admin parameter ignored

GET /api/daily-sessions/summary.details: Returns overall stats + by_user array with per-employee breakdown

PUT /api/daily-sessions/:id/close.details: Only owner or admin can close - returns 403 for unauthorized

Frontend - My Sessions Tab.details: Shows current user's sessions with history table

Frontend - All Sessions Tab.details: Shows all employees' sessions with user avatar and name

Frontend - Reports Tab.details: Shows overall summary cards + per-employee table with stats
